core.required_board_condition: four Team Rocket Pokemon in play

opening: Prefer Murkrow or Articuno Active over exposing Mewtwo
Use Proton and Pokemon search to reach four Team Rocket bodies
Establish Tarountula and Mewtwo while preserving a future Bench slot
middle: Evolve Spidops and recycle Basic Energy from discard
Attach Team Rocket Energy to Mewtwo before generic Energy when it completes the attack contract
Play Team Rocket's Factory before a Rocket Supporter when both are available
Use Giovanni to hand off from the setup Active to a ready Mewtwo
endgame: Compute the minimum Erasure Ball discard tier for the current Prize target
Prefer renewable Basic Energy and preserve Team Rocket Energy
Use Spidops or Wobbuffet for one-Prize routes when they shorten the Prize map

Rocket Mirror.formula: move all damage counters from one Benched Team Rocket Pokemon to opponent Active

energy_philosophy.basic_grass: Spidops attack and renewable Erasure Ball reservoir
energy_philosophy.team_rocket_energy: nonrenewable two-unit Mewtwo payment; never casually discard
